# PrysmNexus

> PrysmNexus is an India-focused growth, automation, and software partner connecting marketing, AI workflows, brand authority, and custom digital products under one accountable team.

## Primary pages

- [Homepage](/): Brand overview, selected capabilities, process, evidence, and FAQs.
- [Services](/services/): Complete service overview.
- [Case Studies](/case-studies/): Named, evidence-labelled client work.
- [Insights](/insights/): Practical guidance for businesses across India.
- [About](/about/): Entity and working approach.
- [Contact](/contact/): Primary enquiry route.

## Core services

- [Brand Strategy and Identity](/services/brand-strategy/)
- [Content Production](/services/content-production/)
- [Social Media Management](/services/social-media-management/)
- [Performance Marketing](/services/performance-marketing/)
- [SEO, Local Search, and Reputation](/services/seo-local-search-reputation/)
- [AI Automation Systems](/services/ai-automation-systems/)
- [Brand and PR Authority](/services/brand-pr-authority/)
- [Custom Software and SaaS Development](/services/custom-software-saas/)

## Decision guides

- [AI Agents vs Chatbots](/insights/ai-agents-vs-chatbots-business-automation/)
- [Custom Software vs Off-the-Shelf SaaS](/insights/custom-software-vs-off-the-shelf-saas/)
- [Digital PR vs Performance Marketing](/insights/digital-pr-vs-performance-marketing/)
